name: cs521-nft-demo
description: End-to-end ERC-721 on-chain NFT demo for CS 521

scripts.deploy:local: HARDHAT_DISABLE_TELEMETRY_PROMPT=true HARDHAT_DISABLE_TELEMETRY=true hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
scripts.deploy:sepolia: HARDHAT_DISABLE_TELEMETRY_PROMPT=true HARDHAT_DISABLE_TELEMETRY=true hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network sepolia
